The '''Ankarres Sapphire''', also known as the '''Antares crystal''', was a crystal that possessed legendary healing powers and numerous other effects. It was one of the most potent crystals that could be used in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] creation. It was also a crystal of great power and could aid a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in battle.

==Overview==
[[File:Ankarres.jpg|thumb|left|The Ankarres Sapphire]]
Legend has it that this [[Sapphire/Legends|sapphire]] could only be wielded by [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light]]-siders. If the crystal or saber was to be touched by someone [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark]], it would slowly heat up and burn their hand. Supposedly, this effect could apparently be reversed if it fell into the wrong hands.

The crystal may have been found by [[Meetra Surik]] at some point in [[3951 BBY]]. It was also held on board the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] by [[Dom Pricina]] until the jewel was stolen by [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]] sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] pawned the sapphire on [[Darlyn Boda/Legends|Darlyn Boda]], but when it did not sell, 4-LOM brought it back to his partner, [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]]. He then attempted to use the Ankarres Sapphire to heal both the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] and [[Samoc Farr/Legends|Samoc Farr]]. It remained with the bounty hunter since.
